signals.reasoning: Keep managing the live TAO short. It remains solidly profitable, is still retaining about 58% of peak P&L, and the board is still clearly bearish enough to support the short thesis.
BTC is too neutral to justify a fresh trade under the caution regime.
ETH has mild constructive tone, but not enough edge to outrank the better setups on this sheet.
SOL is a modest bearish lean because mechanics have rolled over and the tape is no longer supporting the prior squeeze-long case.
DASH has some constructive strength, but caution keeps it below the threshold for a fresh long.
AVNT is too average on edge and quality to justify action here.
USTC remains too thin and noisy to be actionable.
ARB has some bullish qualities, but the setup is not clean enough to justify a fresh entry under caution.
CHILLGUY remains extended and crowded, but not clean enough to trade here.
